ast.target: 最佳思考模型，100万上下文

ast.target: 创建一个新的空数据库

ast.name: description
ast.source: Copy data from an existing database
ast.target: 从现有数据库复制数据

ast.name: description
ast.source: Adds State, Due, Interval, Lapses columns
ast.target: 添加状态、到期日、间隔、失败次数列

ast.name: description
ast.source: Automatically backup database at regular intervals

ast.name: description
ast.source: How often to create automatic backups (only when changes exist)
ast.target: 创建自动备份的频率（仅在存在更改时）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create backup after completing a certain number of reviews
ast.target: 完成一定数量的复习后创建备份

ast.name: description
ast.source: Number of reviews after which to trigger an automatic backup
ast.target: 触发自动备份前的复习次数

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a backup automatically when the plugin loads
ast.target: 插件加载时自动创建备份

ast.name: description
ast.target: 从另一台设备导入数据

ast.name: description
ast.source: Import flashcards from an Anki .apkg file with optional scheduling data
ast.target: 从 Anki .apkg 文件导入闪卡，可选包含调度数据

ast.name: description
ast.source: Export your flashcards as an Anki-compatible .apkg file
ast.target: 将您的闪卡导出为 Anki 兼容的 .apkg 文件

ast.name: description
ast.source: Export your flashcards as a CSV or TSV file for use in spreadsheets or other tools
ast.target: 将您的闪卡导出为 CSV 或 TSV 文件，用于电子表格或其他工具

ast.name: description
ast.source: Detect and repair orphaned cards, notes, and review logs
ast.target: 检测并修复孤立的卡片、笔记和复习日志

ast.name: description
ast.source: Manually create a backup of the current database
ast.target: 手动创建当前数据库的备份

ast.name: description
ast.source: Restore the database from a previous backup (requires Obsidian reload)
ast.target: 从之前的备份恢复数据库（需要重新加载 Obsidian）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Keep one backup per hour for the last N hours (0 = disabled)
ast.target: 过去 N 小时内每小时保留一个备份（0 = 禁用）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Keep one backup per day for the last N days (0 = disabled)
ast.target: 过去 N 天内每天保留一个备份（0 = 禁用）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Keep one backup per week for the last N weeks (0 = disabled)
ast.target: 过去 N 周内每周保留一个备份（0 = 禁用）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum days between reviews. Default: 36500 (100 years)
ast.target: 最大复习间隔天数。默认值：36500（100 年）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Randomize review intervals slightly to prevent cards from bunching on the same day
ast.target: 略微随机化复习间隔，防止卡片在同一天堆积

ast.name: description
ast.source: Recalculate all intervals with current FSRS weights (preview first)
ast.target: 使用当前 FSRS 权重重新计算所有间隔（先预览）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Push all due cards forward by N days
ast.target: 将所有到期卡片向前推移 N 天

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum number of new cards introduced per day
ast.target: 每天引入的新卡片最大数量

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum number of reviews per day (0 = unlimited)
ast.target: 每天最大复习次数（0 = 无限制）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Interactive what-if tool: tweak weights and watch projected retention, workload and review count over time
ast.target: 交互式假设分析工具：调整权重并观察预计的保持率、工作量和复习次数随时间的变化

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use load balancing rules when scheduling future reviews
ast.target: 安排未来复习时使用负载均衡规则

ast.name: description
ast.source: Target number of reviews per day for balancing
ast.target: 用于均衡的每日目标复习次数

ast.name: description
ast.source: Allow this much deviation from target before rebalancing
ast.target: 在重新均衡前允许偏离目标的幅度

ast.name: description
ast.source: Largest day shift allowed when scheduling a newly reviewed card
ast.target: 安排新复习卡片时允许的最大日期偏移量

ast.name: description
ast.source: Range used only by the manual Balance now action
ast.target: 仅用于手动“立即均衡”操作的范围

ast.name: description
ast.source: Apply load balancing immediately to existing scheduled reviews
ast.target: 立即将负载均衡应用于现有的已安排复习

ast.name: description
ast.source: Analyze your review history to find optimal FSRS weights for this preset
ast.target: 分析您的复习历史，为此预设找到最优的 FSRS 权重

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enter 17, 19, or 21 comma-separated values (from FSRS optimizer). Leave empty to use defaults
ast.target: 输入 17、19 或 21 个逗号分隔的值（来自 FSRS 优化器）。留空则使用默认值

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each preset has its own retention target, weights, steps, and daily limits
ast.target: 每个预设都有自己的保持率目标、权重、步骤和每日限制

ast.name: description
ast.source: Comma-separated steps for new cards. Default: 1, 10
ast.target: 新卡片的逗号分隔步骤。默认值：1, 10

ast.name: description
ast.source: Comma-separated steps for lapsed cards. Default: 10
ast.target: 遗忘卡片的逗号分隔步骤。默认值：10

ast.name: description
ast.source: How to order new cards in the review queue
ast.target: 复习队列中新卡片的排序方式

ast.name: description
ast.source: How to order cards due for review
ast.target: 待复习卡片的排序方式

ast.name: description
ast.source: When to show new cards relative to reviews
ast.target: 相对于复习，何时显示新卡片

ast.name: description
ast.source: After reviewing an image occlusion or cloze card, bury remaining cards from the same note until next day. When off, siblings are spaced apart in the queue instead.
ast.target: 复习完图像遮挡或完形填空卡片后，将同一笔记的剩余卡片埋藏至次日。关闭时，兄弟卡片将在队列中分散排列。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Automatically space out cards from the same note
ast.target: 自动分散来自同一笔记的卡片

ast.name: description
ast.source: Minimum days between siblings from the same source
ast.target: 同一来源兄弟卡片之间的最小天数

ast.name: description
ast.source: Spread out siblings that are currently too close
ast.target: 分散当前过于接近的兄弟卡片

ast.name: description

ast.name: description

ast.name: description
ast.source: When studying a specific note from the dashboard, show all its cards regardless of daily limits
ast.target: 从仪表板学习特定笔记时，显示其所有卡片，不受每日限制

ast.name: description
ast.source: Display inline flashcard counts (new/learning/review) next to [[links]] that point to notes with flashcards
ast.target: 在指向包含闪卡笔记的 [[链接]] 旁显示内联闪卡计数（新/学习/复习）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Display donut indicators next to links inside flashcard panel cards
ast.target: 在闪卡面板卡片内的链接旁显示环形指示器

ast.source: Display donut indicators next to links during review sessions
ast.target: 在复习会话期间的链接旁显示环形指示器

ast.name: description
ast.source: Display global due/new/learning card counts in the bottom status bar
ast.target: 在底部状态栏显示全局到期/新/学习卡片计数

ast.name: description
ast.source: Hour when a new day begins (0-23). Default: 4 (4:00 am)
ast.target: 新一天开始的小时（0-23）。默认值：4（凌晨 4:00）

ast.name: description
ast.target: 访问 True Recall 网站

ast.name: description
ast.target: 加入 True Recall 社区

ast.name: description
ast.source: Spaced repetition, memory, and how we should actually study — plus every True Recall release
ast.target: 间隔重复、记忆以及我们应如何学习——外加所有 True Recall 版本发布

ast.name: description
ast.target: 显示答案，然后评级为“良好”

ast.name: description
ast.source: Start an HTTP server for CLI integration when the plugin loads
ast.target: 插件加载时启动 HTTP 服务器以进行 CLI 集成

ast.name: description
ast.source: Local API port (default: 27182). Restart Obsidian after changing.
ast.target: 本地 API 端口（默认：27182）。更改后需重启 Obsidian。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Install the True Recall skill for Claude Code to control flashcards from the terminal
ast.target: 为 Claude Code 安装 True Recall 技能，以便从终端控制闪卡

ast.name: description
ast.source: Merge changes from other devices when the plugin loads
ast.target: 插件加载时合并来自其他设备的更改

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose where AI requests are routed
ast.target: 选择 AI 请求的路由方式

ast.name: description
ast.source: Your own API key — you pay OpenRouter directly per token.
ast.target: 您自己的 API 密钥——您直接按 token 向 OpenRouter 付费。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Reasoning model used for flashcard generation.
ast.target: 用于闪卡生成的推理模型。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 输入任何 OpenRouter 兼容的模型 ID。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fallback model used when a plugin-specific LM Studio model is not set
ast.target: 当未设置插件特定的 LM Studio 模型时使用的备用模型

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional — only needed if you enabled authentication in LM Studio
ast.target: 可选——仅当您在 LM Studio 中启用了身份验证时才需要

ast.name: description
ast.target: OpenAI 兼容的 API 端点

ast.name: description
ast.target: 模型标识符（例如 llama3, mistral）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional — many local setups don't need authentication
ast.target: 可选——许多本地设置不需要身份验证

ast.name: description
ast.source: Used only by AI Flashcard Generation when LM Studio is the selected provider.
ast.target: 仅当 LM Studio 是选定的提供者时，由 AI 闪卡生成功能使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Generate new flashcards from a note. Write one prompt per preset — pick a note type and the pipeline fills its fields.
ast.target: 从笔记生成新闪卡。为每个预设编写一个提示——选择一种笔记类型，然后由流程填充其字段。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Export review history and card progress
ast.target: 导出复习历史和卡片进度

ast.name: description
ast.source: Replay review history to preserve your progress
ast.target: 重放复习历史以保留您的进度

ast.name: description
ast.source: Import .apkg decks with AI-assisted deck classification, field cleanup, and automatic note type mapping. Also exports your True Recall cards back to Anki while preserving FSRS scheduling data.
ast.target: 导入 .apkg 牌组，支持 AI 辅助的牌组分类、字段清理和自动笔记类型映射。同时将您的 True Recall 卡片导出回 Anki，并保留 FSRS 调度数据。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Run freeform prompts instantly without a preview step
ast.target: 立即运行自由格式提示，无需预览步骤

ast.name: description
ast.source: Transform flashcards mid-review or inside the Add Flashcard modal — fix formatting, simplify wording, or run your own custom instructions. Each preset can auto-apply or show a preview, and supports its own hotkey during review.
ast.target: 在复习过程中或添加闪卡模态框内转换闪卡——修复格式、简化措辞或运行您自己的自定义指令。每个预设可以自动应用或显示预览，并在复习期间支持其自己的快捷键。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Polish presets work in review and in the Add Flashcard modal.
ast.target: 润色预设在复习和添加闪卡模态框中均可使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Used only by Card Polish when LM Studio is the selected provider.
ast.target: 仅当 LM Studio 是选定的提供者时，由卡片润色功能使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Embed True Recall dashboards directly in your notes as codeblocks. Includes global due/new/learning counts, analytics (streaks, heatmaps, workload), project overviews, FSRS forecasts, and per-note health widgets.
ast.target: 将 True Recall 仪表板直接作为代码块嵌入您的笔记中。包括全局到期/新/学习计数、分析（连续学习天数、热力图、工作量）、项目概览、FSRS 预测以及每个笔记的健康度小部件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Custom prompt for AI region detection in image occlusion. Leave empty to use built-in prompt.
ast.target: 用于图像遮挡中 AI 区域检测的自定义提示。留空则使用内置提示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create flashcards by masking regions of images. Draw rectangles and ellipses over diagrams, maps, or any image to test visual recall.
ast.target: 通过遮挡图像区域创建闪卡。在图表、地图或任何图像上绘制矩形和椭圆，以测试视觉记忆。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 文件更改时自动重新索引

ast.name: description
ast.source: Also index flashcard content alongside notes
ast.target: 同时索引闪卡内容和笔记

ast.name: description
ast.source: Only index notes in these folders (empty = all)
ast.target: 仅索引这些文件夹中的笔记（留空表示全部）

ast.name: description
ast.target: 跳过这些文件夹中的笔记

ast.name: description
ast.source: Override daily notes folder for smarter indexing (empty = auto-detect)
ast.target: 覆盖每日笔记文件夹以实现更智能的索引（留空表示自动检测）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sections under these headings won't be indexed in daily notes (one per line)
ast.target: 这些标题下的部分不会在每日笔记中被索引（每行一个）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Chat with your notes using RAG-powered AI. Index your vault, ask questions, and get answers grounded in your own knowledge.
ast.target: 使用基于RAG的AI与您的笔记对话。索引您的知识库，提出问题，并获得基于您自身知识的答案。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Show inline status donuts next to [[wikilinks]] that reveal flashcard review state at a glance. In reading mode you also get text count indicators, and hovering a link opens a tooltip with full note stats.
ast.target: 在[[wikilinks]]旁显示内联状态圆环，一眼即可了解闪卡复习状态。在阅读模式下，您还会看到文本计数指示器，悬停链接会打开一个包含完整笔记统计信息的工具提示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Buttons shown when selecting text in the markdown editor
ast.target: 在Markdown编辑器中选择文本时显示的按钮

ast.name: description
ast.source: Buttons shown when selecting text outside the editor (sidebars, terminal, reading view)
ast.target: 在编辑器外部（侧边栏、终端、阅读视图）选择文本时显示的按钮

ast.name: description
ast.source: Buttons shown when clicking an image in the editor
ast.target: 在编辑器中点击图片时显示的按钮

ast.name: description
ast.source: A floating toolbar that appears above selected text or clicked images, with quick actions for flashcard creation, AI generation, and image occlusion. Works in editor, reading mode, and side panels; the button set is fully configurable.
ast.target: 一个浮动工具栏，出现在选中的文本或点击的图片上方，提供用于创建闪卡、AI生成和图像遮挡的快速操作。适用于编辑器、阅读模式和侧边面板；按钮集完全可配置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Show due, new, and learning card counts directly in Obsidian's status bar with color-coded indicators. Click the widget to jump straight into your dashboard without breaking flow.
ast.target: 直接在Obsidian的状态栏中显示到期、新学习和学习中的卡片数量，并带有颜色编码指示器。点击该小部件可直接跳转到您的仪表板，无需中断流程。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Type-in mode used when a new review session starts (T still cycles modes in-session)
ast.target: 新复习会话开始时使用的输入模式（T键仍在会话中切换模式）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional custom system prompt for AI answer grading during review type-in mode. Leave empty to use built-in prompt.
ast.target: 用于复习输入模式期间AI答案评分的可选自定义系统提示。留空则使用内置提示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Test your recall by typing answers instead of just revealing them. AI grades your response semantically.
ast.target: 通过输入答案而非仅仅揭示答案来测试您的回忆能力。AI会从语义上对您的回答进行评分。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Semantic search over the user's notes and flashcards. Returns ranked chunks with content and source info. Use to find relevant context before discussing any topic.
ast.target: 对用户的笔记和闪卡进行语义搜索。返回带有内容和来源信息的排序块。用于在讨论任何主题前查找相关上下文。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Search query — topic or concept to find
ast.target: 搜索查询——要查找的主题或概念

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get current study status: cards due today, reviews completed, correct rate, time spent, card collection breakdown (new/learning/young/mature/suspended), and answer streaks. Use for questions about today's session, due cards, or collection overview.
ast.target: 获取当前学习状态：今日到期卡片、已完成的复习、正确率、花费时间、卡片集合细分（新/学习中/年轻/成熟/已暂停）以及连续答对次数。用于关于今日会话、到期卡片或集合概览的问题。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get FSRS analytics: true retention (actual vs target, trend), workload forecast (predicted reviews per day, peak days), and card distributions (interval, stability, difficulty). Use for deep analytics questions.
ast.target: 获取FSRS分析数据：真实保留率（实际与目标对比、趋势）、工作量预测（每日预测复习量、高峰日）以及卡片分布（间隔、稳定性、难度）。用于深度分析问题。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Identify leech cards — cards with high lapses (>3), low stability (<2 days), or in relearning state. These are cards the user struggles to remember.
ast.target: 识别问题卡片——失败次数高（>3）、稳定性低（<2天）或处于重新学习状态的卡片。这些是用户难以记住的卡片。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 问题卡片的最大数量（默认20）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Analyze study patterns over the last 30 days: best days of week, best hours, and a day/hour heatmap of review activity and success rates.
ast.target: 分析过去30天的学习模式：一周中的最佳学习日、最佳学习时段，以及复习活动和成功率的日期/时段热力图。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Analyze a study session in detail: every card reviewed with ratings, which notes were studied, cards the user struggled with (rated Again), retention rate, and per-note breakdown. Works for today or any past date.
ast.target: 详细分析一次学习会话：每张复习过的卡片及其评分、学习了哪些笔记、用户感到困难的卡片（评为“重来”）、保留率以及按笔记细分的数据。适用于今天或任何过去的日期。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to today if omitted.
ast.target: 日期格式为YYYY-MM-DD。如果省略则默认为今天。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get daily statistics for a date range. Returns reviews completed, new cards studied, time spent, and rating breakdown (again/hard/good/easy) for each day. Use for questions about past days, yesterday, last week, specific dates, or historical trends.
ast.target: 获取日期范围内的每日统计数据。返回每天完成的复习数、学习的新卡片数、花费时间以及评分细分（重来/困难/良好/容易）。用于关于过去几天、昨天、上周、特定日期或历史趋势的问题。

ast.name: description
ast.source: General-purpose assistant for your knowledge base

ast.name: description
ast.source: Best for educational content, helping you grasp new concepts and skills efficiently
ast.target: 最适合教育内容，帮助您高效掌握新概念和技能

ast.name: description
